# ADR-001 — Pick one wodget dialect

## Status

Accepted, 2026-01-15.

## Context

There are two competing wodget dialects in the wild: legacy and v2.
Supporting both internally creates branching code paths that nobody
wants to maintain.

## Decision

Widgetron emits v2 wodgets only. Callers needing legacy output convert
externally.

## Consequences

- Widgetron's convert path is single-implementation.
- A separate `widgetron-legacy-bridge` library can wrap output for
  callers stuck on legacy.
